description: Schema evolution contracts - multi-collection version comparison (NOT in-place mutation)

verification_summary.note: SCH-006 upgraded from still_inconclusive to partially_validated after SCH-006b follow-up confirmed basic filter semantics work correctly.

scope_note: P0 evaluates schema evolution semantics via multi-collection version comparison, NOT in-place schema mutation. Milvus SDK v2.6.10 does not support alter_collection, add_field, drop_field, rename_field operations.

contracts.name: Metadata Accuracy
contracts.statement: Collection metadata must accurately reflect actual schema
contracts.validation_level: Partial - Schema structure accurate, entity count has timing behavior
contracts.universal_note: Schema structure is framework-level; entity count timing is implementation-specific. Cross-database validation NOT performed.
contracts.milvus_evidence: Fields: ['id', 'vector'] correct; Dimension: 128 correct; Entity count: timing behavior (R5B ILC-009b reference)

contracts.name: Metadata Reflection After Change
contracts.statement: After creating collection_v2, collection_v1 metadata must remain accurate and unchanged
contracts.universal_note: Schema isolation is architecturally expected for any multi-database system. Cross-database validation NOT performed - this is a framework-level candidate based on architectural principles, not empirical evidence.
contracts.milvus_evidence: v1 schema unchanged after v2 creation (fields, dimension, primary_key all stable)

layer_3_data_integrity.description: Data Integrity (Critical) - STRICT oracle (BUG_CANDIDATE if data loss)

contracts.name: Data Preservation After Allowed Schema Change
contracts.statement: Creating collection_v2 with extended schema must not affect data in collection_v1
contracts.universal_note: Cross-collection isolation is architecturally expected for any multi-database system. Cross-database validation NOT performed - this is a framework-level candidate based on architectural principles, not empirical evidence.
preconditions: collection_v2 created with additional scalar field
contracts.milvus_evidence: v1 count unchanged after v2 creation (0 → 0)

contracts.name: Backward Query Compatibility
contracts.statement: Queries on collection_v1 must continue working after collection_v2 with different schema is created
contracts.validation_level: Partial - Simple vector search stability confirmed; complex queries not tested
contracts.universal_note: Query stability may vary by implementation. Only basic vector search tested.
contracts.milvus_evidence: v1 query returns 10 results before/after v2; top_id stable at 48

contracts.name: Post-Change Filter Semantics
contracts.statement: Filter queries on new scalar fields must work correctly
contracts.validation_level: Partial - Basic filter semantics validated by SCH-006b; advanced/broader filter semantics not yet fully covered
contracts.universal_candidate: NO - Only basic filters validated on Milvus
contracts.universal_note: Basic filter semantics (VARCHAR match, no-match, INT64 comparison) validated via SCH-006b. Advanced filter expressions (multi-field, complex logic, null handling) not yet fully covered. Only Milvus v2.6.10 validated.
what_was_validated: Filter expression syntax is accepted (no error thrown)
Filter execution path works (query doesn't crash)
Basic VARCHAR filter (match): category == 'alpha' returns correct count
Basic VARCHAR filter (no-match): category == 'gamma' returns 0 correctly
Basic INT64 filter (comparison): priority > 3 returns correct count
Baseline query confirms data insertion works
what_was_NOT_validated: Filter behavior on edge cases (empty strings, special characters)
contracts.re_evaluation: SCH-006b confirmed basic filter semantics work correctly. R5D-006 inconclusive result was due to experiment design issues (no baseline query, no explicit flush), not filter malfunction.
contracts.follow_up_experiment: SCH-006b (COMPLETED): Confirmed basic filter semantics work. No further follow-up needed unless advanced filter testing is required.

sch006b_evidence.conclusion: Basic filter semantics validated on Milvus v2.6.10

preconditions: Data inserted WITH scalar field values
contracts.milvus_evidence: SCH-006b: 3/3 test cases PASSED. Basic filter semantics confirmed working on VARCHAR and INT64 scalar fields.

layer_5_field_semantics.description: Field Semantics (Edge Cases) - CONSERVATIVE oracle (document behavior)

contracts.name: Nullable/Default Field Read Semantics
contracts.statement: Reading missing scalar fields must have deterministic behavior
contracts.validation_level: Observational - Insert/search paths work; null value not observable
contracts.universal_note: Nullable field insert path works; missing nullable values do not crash search path. Full null read/filter semantics NOT conclusively validated - null value not observable via search results.
what_was_validated: Insert without nullable field value (no error)
Search with missing field values (returns results)
what_was_NOT_validated: Null value visibility in search results
Full null read semantics (requires direct read, not search)
preconditions: collection_v2 created with nullable scalar field
Data inserted WITHOUT scalar field value
postconditions: Behavior is deterministic (null, default, or error)
contracts.milvus_evidence: Nullable field insert works; search returns results but null value not present in output

contracts.name: Nullable/Default Field Read Semantics
contracts.result: OBSERVATION - Insert/search paths work; null semantics not fully validated

contracts.name: Post-Change Filter Semantics
contracts.result: OBSERVATION - Filter executes but returns 0 results; effectiveness inconclusive

round1_summary.key_finding: Multi-collection schema version comparison successfully validates schema evolution semantics without in-place mutation support

key_conclusions.cross_collection_isolation: Strongly validated - Framework-level candidate for cross-db validation
key_conclusions.query_compatibility: Partially validated - Basic vector search stable on Milvus
key_conclusions.metadata_accuracy: Partially validated - Structure accurate, timing behavior documented
key_conclusions.null_semantics: Observational only - Insert/search paths work, null value not observable
key_conclusions.filter_semantics: Partially validated - Basic filter semantics confirmed via SCH-006b

sch006b_outcome.sch006b_result: 3/3 test cases PASSED - basic filter semantics confirmed
sch006b_outcome.conclusion: SCH-006 upgraded to partially_validated. R5D-006 inconclusive result was due to experiment design issues, not filter malfunction.
sch006b_outcome.limitation: Basic filter semantics validated; advanced/broader filter expressions not yet fully covered

universal_claims_removed: SCH-001: Changed from 'YES' to 'Framework-level candidate (NOT Universal)'
SCH-008: Changed from 'YES' to 'Framework-level candidate (NOT Universal)'
final_summary.what_remains_open: Advanced filter testing (multi-field, complex logic, null handling) - not required unless cross-database comparison needed
final_summary.no_broad_expansion: SCH-006b completed successfully. No further expansion recommended.

dropped.description: Dropped - Operation not supported in SDK

contracts.name: Forbidden Schema Change Gate
contracts.reason: alter_collection operation not supported in pymilvus SDK v2.6.10
